steps.title: Find the true subject
steps.content: The subject is the singular “Nora Feldman.” The phrase beginning “along with researchers…” adds information about other people but does not make the grammatical subject plural.

steps.title: Match singular agreement
steps.content: A, B, and C are plural verb forms, so they do not agree with the singular subject. The sentence needs a third-person singular present-tense verb for Nora Feldman. The answer is D.
